name: autonomous-dev-portal
description: Local web portal for monitoring autonomous-dev requests, runs, and audit logs.

port.title: Portal port
port.description: TCP port the portal binds to (loopback by default; valid range 1024-65535).

auth_mode.title: Auth mode
auth_mode.description: Authentication mode for incoming portal connections. One of: localhost, tailscale, oauth.

oauth_provider.title: OAuth provider
oauth_provider.description: Required when auth_mode=oauth. OAuth provider identifier: '', github, or google.

sse_update_interval_seconds.title: SSE update interval (seconds)
sse_update_interval_seconds.description: Server-sent events update cadence (valid range 1-60 seconds).

portal_path_policy_allowed_roots.title: Path policy allowed roots
portal_path_policy_allowed_roots.description: Comma-separated absolute paths the portal is permitted to read. Empty disables file access.
